behavior_trees.planner_output: Move forward until an obstacle is detected, then rotate left and move forward again. Repeat if necessary until reaching the target. If at the target, finish the task. If at_goal is true, finish the task. If any movement is blocked, rotate and try again. If the target is detected ahead, move forward directly towards it. If the target is not detected, continue moving forward until an obstacle is encountered.

Move forward 1.0 meter, then rotate 90 degrees to the right. If an obstacle is detected, move backward 1.0 meter and adjust the rotation accordingly. Continue this pattern until the target is reached or an obstacle blocks the path. If the target is not reached after 5 rotations, request a new plan.

Move forward 1.0 meter. If obstacle is ahead, rotate 90 degrees to the left. Repeat this process until target_ahead is true or obstacle_ahead becomes true. If at_goal is true, finish the task. If the target is not reached after 5 attempts, request replanning.
